title: Covert Ops clone trooper

'''Covert Ops clone troopers''' were elite [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] serving with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. These troopers were mainly assigned to perform "dirty work" that most clones would find questionable and unethical, mainly finding and eliminating clone troopers who have deserted the army.

==History==
Covert Ops troopers were standard [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], drawn from the rank-and-file formations, who had shown some potential for "dirty work." [[Director of Special Forces]] [[Arligan Zey]] tasked [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARCs]] [[Jaing Skirata|N-10]] and [[Prudii Skirata|N-5]] with training them in [[Commando/Legends|commando]] tactics, along with former [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Cuy'val Dar]] [[Wad'e Tay'haai]] and [[Mij Gilamar]]. However, the "dirty work" they were sent out to do was not always as clear-cut as expected: serving in [[Squad/Legends|squads of two]], covert ops troopers were occasionally sent to eliminate other [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] who had chosen to [[Desertion/Legends|desert]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and live their own, independent, lives. Their trainers were kept in the dark about the sinister task they were training the Covert Ops clones to carry out and were furious when they found out.<ref name="RCTC" />

One of the few known operations of this type was on [[Gaftikar]] when [[Moz]] and [[Olun]] were deployed to eliminate [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha ARC]] [[Sull]], an ARC trooper who had deserted his post. This two-man team was [[Death/Legends|KIA]] by [[Darman Skirata|Darman]], who was mistaken for Sull when undercover and attacked.<ref name="RCTC" />

This type of clone trooper was one of the most secretive in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as their activities were kept from both public and military records. Contrary to the other elite clone troopers, Covert Ops troopers were not part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] nor did they follow the proper chain of command. The [[Director of Special Forces]] even ignored their existence for a long time. They took orders directly from the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]].<ref name="RCTC">''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''</ref>

==Equipment==
Most Covert Ops troopers utilized modified [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifles]] and [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]] [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] in combat. They wore prototype armor with a specialized coating of [[Reflec/Legends|Reflec]] to better conceal themselves. The armor was purple in [[Color/Legends|color]] with brown camouflage. It had two purple trident symbols, one on the wrist and one on the chest,<ref name="Shop">>{{SWArchive|url=collecting/shop/shopnews/news20050829.html|text=Exclusive Covert Ops Trooper Available Now at StarWarsShop}}</ref> reminiscent of the ones Wad'e Tay'haai wore on his shoulder armor.<ref name="Topps">{{Topps|set=2009 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 4|cardname=Artist Sketch Card: Jamie Snell}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:CoOpsTrooper.jpg|thumb|right|150px|The action figure version of the trooper.]]
This type of trooper made its first appearance as a [[StarWars.com|StarWarsShop.com]] exclusive action figure.<ref name="Shop" /> The backstory of the Covert Ops clone trooper was meant to be developed by fans in Round 6 of the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']]. However, according to [[Pablo Hidalgo]], "A winning entry was selected, but it became apparent that projects in the works tread too closely to the lore being established in the CO troopers, that the call was made to pull it. Better that than introduce an instant-continuity error."<ref name="What's the Story>{{SW|subdomain=forums|url=thread.jspa?threadID=228419&start=0|text=Star Wars Forums|nolive=1|nobackup=1}}</ref> The backstory of the covert ops troopers was established in ''True Colors''.<ref name="RCTC" />
